DISCOVERY 301,PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS' MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR VIOLATION OF A COURT DISCOVERY ORDER. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: SO LONG AS DEFENDANT ALLOWS INSPECTION ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 28, 2011, THERE WILL BE NO EVIDENTIARY SANCTION. IF HE FAILS TO DO SO, HE MAY NOT PROCEED ON AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE OF HABITABILITY OR EVIDENCE RE: CONDITIONS. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PAY $250 IN SANCTIONS ON OR BEFORE MARCH 14, 2011. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

Appearances:

Curtis Dowling, Esq. for Plaintiff Larmar Urban Specialty Partners.
Shawn O'Leary, Esq. representing the Defendant Matthew Server through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin, litigant(s) and counsel confer privately in Room 503-A,
for settlement discussions.

Case settled, Trial Date vacated.

Motion For Sanctions For Violation Of A Court Discovery Order
Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS' MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR VIOLATION OF A COURT DISCOVERY ORDER. Appearances: Curtis F. Dowling of Beckman Marquez & Dowling (495.8500) for plaintiff and moving party; Matthew Sever (894.9708) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona. Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: motion granted as follows: so long as defendant allows inspection on or before February 28, 2011, there will be no evidentiary sanction. If he fails to do so, he may not proceed on affirmative defense of habitability or evidence re: conditions. Defendant is required to pay $250 in sanctions on or before March 14, 2011. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported

Ntc And Motion To Compel A Property Inspection And Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions And Supporting Memo Of P And A
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CURTIS F. DOWLING OF THE BECKMAN, MARQUEZ & DOWLING LLP, TEL. NO. 495-8500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS' Motion To Compel A Property Inspection And Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified discovery responses, without objections, by personal service to plaintiff's counsel and to permit inspection of the subject premises no later than 2/10/11. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $400.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =(301/PJB)
